elements.original_description: A simple 2D cartoon graphic of a red brick school building with a bell tower, surrounded by green grass and a blue sky. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a red brick school building with a bell tower, surrounded by vibrant green grass and a bright blue sky. Clean flat vector art with high contrast, pure white background, no shading or gradients. Cartoon style, highly detailed, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
